item.title: Regeneron/Telix - Radiopharma Deal
item.description:
• Summary: Regeneron enters the radiopharma field through a strategic deal with Telix, involving a $40 million upfront payment and potential milestones up to $4.3 billion. The alliance aims to develop targeted radiopharmaceuticals.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, BioSpace, Fierce Pharma, Fierce Biotech

item.title: AbbVie/Haisco - Acute Pain Assets Deal
item.description:
• Summary: AbbVie signs a deal worth up to $715 million with Chinese biotech Haisco to acquire two acute pain assets, expanding its portfolio in pain management therapeutics.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, BioSpace

item.title: Corporate Restructuring & Workforce
item.description:
• Summary: Click Therapeutics has cut 27% of its workforce following a $50 million raise, as reported by Endpoints News. This restructuring highlights challenges in the biotech sector amid funding environments.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News

item.title: IPOs & Financings
item.description:
• Summary: Companies including Kailera, Seaport, and Hemab are filing for IPOs. Kailera aims to raise $52.85 million to support Chinese obesity assets, while Seaport prepares to fund depression drugs advancing to Phase 3 trials.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News, Fierce Biotech

item.title: Viiv Healthcare - Marketing Campaign
item.description:
• Summary: Viiv Healthcare has launched the "Still Here" marketing campaign aimed at younger people with HIV, focusing on awareness and engagement to address stigma and improve healthcare outcomes.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
